text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Grandma! Tell me more about racing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You've really taken to that spell, haven't
you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! 'Cause it's a super strong spell even for
you, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If I run in races, will I be able to find it? Will I be
able to use it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but of course you will! You're the
granddaughter of a great witch, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: But it won't be easy to find, you know. It's a grand spell...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it even has the power to change people's
lives.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Well, if you say it's a grand spell, then it
must be really powerful.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really hope I can find that racing spell soon...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But if I run, people are just gonna tell me what to
do again...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All I wanna do is find racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I hate this.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I didn't win the Derby... but I'll win the Kikuka Sho for sure!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Onlookers
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You were so wonderful in the Derby! I'll be
cheering for you to win the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Derby Champion
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your support! I'm just glad I can be a
source of courage for you all!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! You're sooo cool!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That's a double crown champion for you. Unlike
me, she took the lead in the Classic Triple
Crown...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rob Roy! Um...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Y-you do your best too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Haha... I will... Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...I ran off.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I came to this academy because I wanted to be a
hero, and I'm racing because I want to change.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: But I'm still nothing. I haven't changed at all...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Wait a second. That hat...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Swee—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Shhh...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I think she fell asleep. Don't wake her up.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey... Grandma... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
See? Look how much quieter she is like this. And
she sounds cuter as well.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You're right.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I heard that her grandmother lives somewhere
very verdant. Apparently, it's overflowing with
flowers, just like this flower bed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why I brought her here initially. I thought
it'd be a nice place for her to rest when she
needed it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I can't let her skip training to come here. I
intend to give her a piece of my mind when she
wakes up.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...Wow, Air Groove. You're really watching over
her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am. I have high hopes for her. But I'm concerned
at the same time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I believe she has the capacity to guide others.
And I hope she takes care not to lose it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The capacity to guide others...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell her I said that. I don't want her getting
cocky.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mm... Mmm... Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing, Sweep! I can't believe you're
getting times like these so soon after starting at
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to recommend you for tryouts! Make
sure you listen to what the trainers say!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You need to hold back more at the start, Sweep!
You'll be able to make better use of your
strengths that way!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You can't just do whatever you want, Sweep
Tosho. Your abilities will end up going to waste.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Quit trying to control every little thing I do!
I'm—

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: This is all for your sake.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho! You need to be more...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer C
text_block_list.text: That's not right, Sweep. You need to...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Ugh... Here we go again...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz... Hey... Grand...ma...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I don't... wanna...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the incident at her debut, Sweep Tosho
gets upset whenever the topic of racing is
brought up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She struggles to concentrate before races, and I
feel like her number of late starts has increased
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to get to the bottom of it all, but she only
gets frustrated when I try talking to her about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar! Take me to Grandma's house.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hurry! Hurry up and take me there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to contact her grandmother, get her
address, and secure a means of transportation.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Hello! Welcome back, my adorable little Sweepy! It's been months since you've last graced this great witch's manor with your presence!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Guess what, Grandma! I was reading a book and I
saw Undine's rainbow spell in there!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Can I try it out at the river?! I wanna show you my
magic!
choice_data_list: You want to go to a river?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've got two more months until the Hanshin
J.F., which she herself suggested.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The river's freezing at this time of year. If she fell
in and got sick, she might have to withdraw from
the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I doubt the river is especially safe or looked after
either. And her shoes aren't suited for walking
near rivers. If she slipped in somewhere where the
current was strong...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What is it, Familiar?
choice_data_list:
The river's dangerous, and it's very cold at this
time of year...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So now you're gonna start talking about what's
good for me too?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Sweepy. I'm sure that's not what your
trainer means to say.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But those shoes won't do for the river. If you're
going to cast a spirit spell, you've got to wear
clothes that are compatible with the area!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
There, it looks like you've remembered. So, if
you're going to practice magic by the river...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I need to be polite to the spirits and wear shoes
that won't slip!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: That's right. And let's take a nice, warm scarf as well, in case you get cold! A scarf would be very compatible with the cold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho changes her shoes and then begins
chanting spells by the river.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her grandmother watches over her quietly,
holding a towel and scarf in her hands.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: I'm terribly sorry for butting in earlier.
choice_data_list:
Not at all. I should be thanking you for your
help.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: I expect you've already realized this, but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Sweepy is a very special child. She's positively
overflowing with potential.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
That's why so many people have high hopes for
her future, and why they've worried over her since
she was little.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma! Familiar! I'm gonna cast my spell
somewhere else!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll stay where you can see me, though! Make sure
you keep watching so you don't miss the magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text: Okay, Sweepy! We're watching!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Having people worry for you is a wonderful thing.
It means they really care about you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But have you ever felt that people are worrying
about you so much because they don't have faith
in you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Adults have more wisdom and experience than
children, so they often know the right path.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
But that isn't to say that children don't know the
right path themselves.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
They have their own compass, and it works even
without any guidance from adults. They're not
babies, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to guide her. I want to support her.
This is her adventure.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma! I'm starting to get chilly! Let's go and
have some tea before I catch a cold!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's a wonderful idea! Let's go back to the
house!

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Grandma
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if we talked about this a little
more, Trainer? I'll brew you some of my special
herbal tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us head back to Sweep Tosho's
grandmother's house and enjoy some tea.
